description_long: This is a sleek, low-profile red coupe car with a distinctive aerodynamic design, featuring a prominent rear spoiler and sculpted body lines. The car has a sharply angled front end with integrated headlights and a wide, blacked-out grille area. Its side profile reveals two doors, flush door handles, and large, multi-spoke alloy wheels, as well as a circular fuel cap on the rear fender. The rear view showcases quad exhaust tips, a detailed taillight assembly, and a visible Ferrari badge above the license plate area. The windows are tinted black, and the roofline flows smoothly into the rear, giving the car a fastback appearance. The overall design suggests a high-performance sports car, likely inspired by classic Ferrari models.
description: A red, aerodynamic coupe car with a fastback roofline, rear spoiler, and Ferrari badging. It features two doors, tinted windows, and sporty alloy wheels.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the quad exhaust tips, rear spoiler, taillights, and Ferrari badge above the license plate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door configuration, alloy wheels, circular fuel cap, and sculpted body lines.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the sharply angled hood, integrated headlights, and wide black grille area.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the door, wheels, and aerodynamic contours.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
